title: Tempting Tropical Tunisian Vegetable Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Tunisian dish featuring a variety of vegetables, coconut flakes, and herbal spices, all slow-cooked to perfection in a rich and savory tagine sauce. This satvik-friendly recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality oil with a high smoke point

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the sliced carrots, zucchini, and bell pepper, and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are tender.
Stir in the coconut flakes, cumin, and coriander, and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Season the tagine with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs and a sprinkle of coconut flakes.
